description: May and Mack consult Dr. Benson regarding the nature of the Coulson lookalike. Benson cycles through S.H.I.E.L.D.'s obscure tech and life model decoy theories but lacks a clear answer. May is adamant that Coulson was truly gone, while Benson examines evidence from the crime scene, concluding that the DNA matches Coulson exactly, heightening the mystery.

transcript.line: Where are you on this doppelganger?

Oh, I have several viable hypotheses. That's what scientists say when they don't know squat. Odds are it's related to one of S.H.I.E.L.D.'s previous mistakes, which I'm working my way through a very long list... um, fear manifestations, nano-masks, Inhumans... Though I'm thinking I should revisit the file on those Life Model Decoys, which really shouldn't be a thing, by the way.
Could this guy be an LMD?
Well, if there's already been one of Phil Coulson, it seems like a possible explanation. But I would need to talk to the idiot who designed them.
